title: Iced Lava
description: Adds an orange ice which produces lava when broken
body:
### This is a simple mod that adds a single block: *Iced Lava*
This block will turn into lava when broken, just like normal ice turns into water.

This mod is useful if you want to give the player lava, but not buckets.

 ![Cobble Generator Setup](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/NoSSEOkY/images/c79645311a358a279af85ea70a5e2644241505ea.png)
